name_en: 💰Medium Simply FENDI Handbag, debuted at the 2024-25 Fall/Winter Fashion Show, inspired by a vintage style from the early 1990s, named for its elegant basic design. Beige low-gloss calfskin. Adorned with signature FF decoration in matching patent leather. Features a knotted long calfskin pull tab, with an internal lined compartment featuring a zip pocket, and silver hardware. Equipped with an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder or crossbody carrying.
name_cn:
💰Medium Simply FENDI Handbag, debuted at the 2024-25 Fall/Winter Fashion Show, inspired by a vintage style from the early 1990s, named for its elegant basic design. Beige low-gloss calfskin. Model: 5592, Size: 34.5/20/4.5
